headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Quest Diagnostics, DaVita, LifeStance Health and Aveanna Healthcare
summary: Quest Diagnostics, DaVita, LifeStance Health and Aveanna Healthcare are benefiting from telehealth, AI adoption and growing home-care demand.
